name: FIGHT EVO360
addressFull: 193/15 Moo 11, Thepprasit Road, Pattaya City, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Published program Mon-Sat: running 06:30-08:00, Muay Thai 08:00-10:00 and 16:00-18:00, open gym 08:00-20:00; additional beginner, kids, wrestling, yoga and strength sessions vary by day. Check the live schedule for closures.

pricing.dropIn: ฿300 morning; ฿500 evening; ฿700 for two sessions in one day
pricing.weekly: ฿1,500 morning; ฿2,500 evening; ฿3,500 twice daily (6 training days)
pricing.monthly: ฿3,500 morning; ฿6,000 evening; official booking portal also lists ฿10,000 for two sessions daily plus open gym
packages: Kids program, 3 sessions per week for one month: ฿3,000
pricing.notes: NOW Muay Thai publishes the session and package menu. The gym's own Gymdesk portal separately lists ฿10,000/month for two daily sessions plus open gym, so monthly products are channel-specific and should be confirmed before payment.

classes.schedule: Muay Thai twice daily Mon-Sat, morning running, open gym, selected beginner groups, kids Muay Thai, freestyle wrestling, yoga and strength-and-conditioning sessions

audience.whoShouldSkip: Visitors seeking a traditional live-in camp should note that no on-site accommodation was confirmed.

praise: Reviewers repeatedly describe the space as clean and well equipped.
Beginners say trainers teach fundamentals rather than leaving new students behind.
Longer-stay trainees praise friendly trainers, technique correction and serious conditioning.

comparison.differentiator: A modern training schedule combining twice-daily Muay Thai with open gym, strength and conditioning, wrestling, yoga and a separate beginner group.

sources.label: Google Maps location listing and reviews
NOW Muay Thai gym, price and facility profile
